name: Zotero Sync
description: SDK-side reconciler for Zotero → Thymer sync. Drains desired-state blobs from References' 'Sync Data' into structured fields (scalars + multi-value relations + annotations) — the multi-value writes MCP can't do. Global plugin; self-provisions its collections. Also provides the 'Zotero: Library' pull-based search/import panel; each desktop's Zotero auto-registers its access token into custom.libraryTokens over MCP (no manual token setup).
